message.content:
@startuml
!theme base

class "Player" as Player {
  log: Logger
  id: Integer
  start_field: ConnectedField
  pieces: List of Piece
  home: List of HomeField
  dest: List of Field
  name: String

  id: Integer
  start_field: ConnectedField
  home: List of HomeField
  dest: List of Field

  Player(
    log: Logger,
    player_id: Integer,
    start_field: ConnectedField,
    home: obsv: (
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    ),
    dest: obsv: (
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    )
  ): Player

  init_home(
    obsv: (
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    )
  )

  init_dest(
    obsv: (
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    )
  )

  calc_dests(distance: Integer)
  can_move(): Boolean
  can_throw(): Boolean
  has_won(): Boolean
  wrap_obsv(
    obsv: (
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),
      Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
    )
  ): (
    Callable(field: Integer),
    Callable(field: Integer)
  )

  _str_(): String
}

class "Game" as Game {
  log: Logger
  die: Die
  players: List of Player
  all_players: List of Player
  active_player_idx: Integer
  track: List of ConnectedField
  tries: Integer
  allow_move: Boolean
  active_player: Player

  end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
  begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer)
  home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer)
  home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
  track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer)
  game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer)

  Game(
    log: Logger,
    end_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer),
    begin_turn_obsv: Callable(player: Integer),
    home_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer),
    home_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),
    track_vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),
    track_filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer),
    dest_vacated_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),
    dest_filled_obsv: Callable(owner: Integer, field: Integer, place: Integer),
    game_end_obsv: Callable(winner: Integer)
  ): Game

  init_track()

  set_players(players: Iterator over (Integer, Boolean))
  roll_die(): Integer

  try_move_home(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  try_move_track(field_id: Integer)
  try_move_dest(owner_id: Integer, field_id: Integer)
  allow_move()
  try_move(src: Field)

  player(num: int): Player
  end_move()
  next_player()
  begin_turn()
  begin_move()
}

class "Die" as Die {
  log: Logger
  pips: Integer

  Die(log: Logger): Die
  roll(): Integer
  get(): Integer

  _str_(): String
}

class "ConnectedField" as ConnectedField {
  next_field: Field

  ConnectedField(
    field_id: Integer,
    log: Logger,
    name: String,
    vacate_obsv: Callabel(field: Integer),
    fill_obsv: Callabel(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  ): ConnectedField

  connect_next(next_field: Field)
  try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  is_packed(): Boolean
  skip(distance: Integer, player: Player)
  player_next_field(player: Player): Field
}

class "HomeField" as HomeField {
  HomeField(
    field_id: Integer,
    log: Logger,
    start_field: Field,
    vacate_obsv: Callable(field: Integer),
    fill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  ): HomeField

  try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  skip(distance: Integer, player: Player): Optional Field
}

class "Field" as Field {
  log: Logger
  id: Integer
  piece: Piece
  id: Integer
  piece: Piece
  occupant: Player
  vacated_obsv: Callable(field: Integer)
  filled_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)

  Field(
    field_id: Integer,
    log: Logger,
    name: String,
    vacate_obsv: Callabel(field: Integer),
    fill_obsv: Callable(field: Integer, place: Integer)
  ): Field

  vacate()
  fill(piece: Piece)
  try_dest(player: Player, distance: Integer): Optional Field
  is_packed(): Boolean
  skip(distance: Integer): Optional Field
}

class "Piece" as Piece {
  log: Logger
  owner: Player
  location: Field
  dest: Optional Field
  owner: Player
  dest: Optional Field

  Piece(
    log: Logger,
    piece_id: Integer,
    owner: Player,
    location: HomeField,
  ): Piece

  calc_dest(distance: Integer)
  move_to_home()
  move_to_dest()
  move_to(dest: Field)

  _str_(): String
}

Player --> Game : 1
Game --> Die : 1
Game --> ConnectedField : 1
Game --> Field : 1
Game --> Piece : 40
Game --> HomeField : 1
Game --> Player : 1
ConnectedField --> Field : 1
HomeField --> Field : 1
Piece --> Field : 0-1
Piece --> HomeField : 1

@enduml
